# Delivery Plan

**Created:** 2026-03-08
**Total Phases:** 4

## Summary
Large-scale isolation removal triggered 6 tombstones and cascaded spec resets across 16 features. Phasing separates dead-code cleanup from foundation rebuilds and the heavyweight cdd_branch_collab rewrite (14 new scenarios). Dependency order drives phase sequencing.

## Phase 1 -- Tombstone Cleanup [IN_PROGRESS]
**Features:** tombstones/cdd_isolated_teams.md, tombstones/isolated_teams.md, tombstones/pl_isolated_pull.md, tombstones/pl_isolated_push.md, tombstones/policy_collaboration.md, tombstones/workflow_checklist_system.md
